strengths: Demonstrated hands-on experience building event-driven systems and agentic workflows, including MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record scaling technical systems across diverse domains (real-time data, microservices, high-throughput APIs)
Active contributor to open-source infrastructure tools and strong engineering culture advocacy (TDD, CI/CD, workshops)
concerns: Lack of explicit evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments or with financial risk consequences
No clear indication of experience managing engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
Limited visibility into production-grade AI reliability practices (fallbacks, latency budgets, cost modeling, evaluation pipelines)
response.justification: Bogdan brings strong technical depth in event-driven systems, agentic tooling, and full-stack engineering with a clear bias for production quality and observability, but lacks demonstrable experience in regulated fintech infrastructure and scaling leadership beyond mid-sized teams, which are critical for this executive role.
